zh.Norville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandi: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利諾維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Norville II於1164年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利諾維爾時，他的父親Richard De Norville III39歲，母親Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte39歲。他於1199年與Auctina Witt在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1200年在他的家鄉享年36歲。

zh-hans.Norville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandi: 法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利諾維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard De Norville II于1164年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利諾維爾时，他的父亲Richard De Norville III39岁，母亲Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte39岁。他于1199年与Auctina Witt在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1200年在他的家乡享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Norville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset, of Norman origin): shortened form of the Norman habitational name Normanville, from Normanville, Seine-Maritime, or Normanville, Eure, both in France.

variants.name: Norvell
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Norville  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Norville II was born in 1164, in Norville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Richard De Norville III, was 39 and his mother, Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte, was 39. He married Auctina Witt in 1199, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1200, in his hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard De Norville II est né en 1164, à Norville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Richard De Norville III, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Auctina Witt en 1199, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1200, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard De Norville II 1164 in Norville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard De Norville III 39 und seine Mutter Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte 39. Er hat 1199 in England Auctina Witt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1200 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Norville II è nato il nel 1164 nel Norville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Richard De Norville III, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Auctina Witt nel 1199, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1200, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックス
ja.Norville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandi: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメノーヴィル
ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Norville IIが1164年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメノーヴィルで生まれた時，父Richard De Norville IIIは39歳，母Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonteは39歳であった。1199年にイギリスでAuctina Wittと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1200年に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Norville II(이)가 1164년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 노르빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Norville III(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1199년 영국에서 Auctina Witt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1200년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Norville II nasceu em 1164, em Norville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard De Norville III, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Auctina Witt em 1199, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1200, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Norville II родился в 1164 г. в местности норвилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard De Norville III было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Auctina Witt в 1199 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1200 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard De Norville II nació en 1164, en Norville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard De Norville III, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mrs. Norvile III Dalbemonte, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Auctina Witt en 1199, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1200, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
